hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f && [[ "$f" == *.java ]] && [[ "$f" == */src/main/java/* ]] && ./gradlew checkstyleMain 2>&1 | tail -20; } || true

mkdir -p .chat-history && [ ! -f .chat-history/log.md ] && touch .chat-history/log.md; jq -n --rawfile content .chat-history/log.md '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":("=== Previous Chat History (.chat-history/log.md) ===\n" + $content + "=== End of Chat History ===")}}' 2>/dev/null || true
